text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, I spot Agnes Digital perusing an
Umamusume magazine.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Hooooo, that hits the spot... There's only one
cure to ease exhaustion, and that's my oshis!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
...But honestly, what I really want is to run in more
races and see more and more Umas!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: But my body just can't keep up...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: No... Stand up! Stand up, Digitan! If it's for our precious Umas, I know we can do it!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
We've definitely got this! We can do anything if
it's for our oshis!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She seems to be feeling worn out. I should
probably adjust her race schedule.
